mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOCF_TARGET_CONTRACT ( TARGET_ID, BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, REPAYMENT_TYPE, PRINCIPAL_AMT, FEE_AMT, DIRECT_COST_AMT, ANNUAL_NOMINAL_RATE, EXECUTION_DATE, MATURITY_DATE, TERM_IN_MONTHS ) SELECT SQ_LOCF_TARGET_CONTRACT.NEXTVAL, #{batchExecutionId}, c.CONTRACT_ID, c.CONTRACT_NO, c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.PRODUCT_CODE, c.REPAYMENT_TYPE, c.PRINCIPAL_AMT, c.FEE_AMT, c.DIRECT_COST_AMT, r.ANNUAL_NOMINAL_RATE, c.EXECUTION_DATE, c.MATURITY_DATE, ( (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.MATURITY_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.EXECUTION_DATE)) * 12 + (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM c.MATURITY_DATE) - EXTRACT(MONTH FROM c.EXECUTION_DATE)) ) FROM LOAN_CONTRACT c JOIN LOAN_RATE r ON r.CONTRACT_ID = c.CONTRACT_ID JOIN LOAN_BALANCE b ON b.CONTRACT_ID = c.CONTRACT_ID WHERE c.STATUS_CODE = 'ACTIVE' AND b.BASE_DATE = #{baseDate}
mapper.select: SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, t.CONTRACT_ID, t.CONTRACT_NO, t.CUSTOMER_ID, cm.CUSTOMER_NAME, t.PRODUCT_CODE, t.REPAYMENT_TYPE, t.PRINCIPAL_AMT, t.FEE_AMT, t.DIRECT_COST_AMT, t.ANNUAL_NOMINAL_RATE, t.EXECUTION_DATE, t.MATURITY_DATE, t.TERM_IN_MONTHS FROM LOCF_TARGET_CONTRACT t LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER_MASTER cm ON cm.CUSTOMER_ID = t.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE t.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = #{batchExecutionId} ORDER BY t.CONTRACT_ID ASC
